name: openEuler sig-Java SIG
description: The Java team is responsible for the development and maintenance of OS system java releated packages in openeuler community.

name: openEuler sig-Java SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-Java SIG maintains 632 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Java SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The Java team is responsible for the development and maintenance of OS system java releated packages in openeuler community.. The SIG has 8 core members and maintains 632 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Java SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Java SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Java SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Java SIG maintains 632 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Java.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Java SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Java SIG has 2 Maintainers, including: chong Wang, Dingli Zhang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
